title: Founding Growth Lead
key_evidence: Requires 4+ yrs growth/commercial at seed-Series A startups; Ryan has ~4.4 yrs at Minima (seed->Series A) as first employee — direct match on stage/tenure.

Must be 'genuinely fluent in AI' with daily hands-on use and workflow building; Ryan builds Claude Code agents (competitor-intel + growth) — strong direct match, and the apply form explicitly requires an example AI workflow.
Must 'build sales pipeline from scratch' via cold calls/email/LinkedIn + B2B events; Ryan's growth is community-led/PR/content, NOT B2B outbound sales pipeline — this is the primary requirements gap.

Funding: $1M seed (Steven Bartlett, Balderton, Dawn, Microsoft AI partners); named 'hottest startup in London' by Sifted; UK Gov AI-upskilling events partner; trained 1,000+ teams. High media visibility => elevated applicant volume.
2-person founder team (Amelia & Lydia Miller, both Forbes 30u30); apply via short typeform direct to founders — founder-read screening, no recruiter/ATS keyword filter.
Salary £50-80k + equity, in-office Shoreditch — clears £50k floor; clear founder-led process.
biggest_lever: Lead with the $4.5m community-led presale (15x ROI on $300k) reframed as zero-to-one pipeline building + the Claude Code AI workflow example the form demands — both map directly to 'build growth from scratch' and 'fluent in AI'.
biggest_risk: Role is explicitly B2B outbound sales-pipeline ownership (cold outreach, deal closure for clients like Red Bull); Ryan has no enterprise B2B sales/closing track record — community-led growth may read as adjacent not core. High media hype also raises applicant volume.
recency_note: No hard date: hosted on a standalone Lovable app (no ATS/Lever/Greenhouse date), LinkedIn ivee roles undated, WebSearch yielded none. generalist.world tags it '✨ New' (soft recent signal, not a date). Per protocol date-unknown -> G=45, low confidence. Callback 66 -> 62.
